title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Future Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
